creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The x11/libcapplet has been broken for over a year (will be two in June 2011).
So far, there is no one has any interest to fix or bother us the old GNOME 1
stuff. The GNOME 3 is coming in 2011. Therefore, it's time for us to kill some
of GNOME 1.

Fix: 

Here's a patch that need to be tested in the pointyhat-exp.

http://people.freebsd.org/~mezz/diff/remove_libcapplet_stuff.diff

Not all ports are deleted, which some are able to disable option without
require me to remove those. List following delete ports:

deskutils/gnome-pim
mail/pmail
mail/pygmy
math/scigraphica
net/geotrace
security/nofgpg
sysutils/gnome-control-center1
www/gtkhtml
x11/libcapplet
x11/wmmenu
x11-toolkits/py-gnome
How-To-Repeat: n/a
